series_metadata.series_description: Records, reports, and other working documents which detail the annual fixed asset inventory of equipment owned or leased by the Auditor of State. Documents include completed DAS property inventory annual certificates, completed DAS annual/biennial inventory certificates, physical inventory worksheets and corresponding support documentation, annual physical inventory report, annual and monthly disposal/addition reports and corresponding support documentation.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: while needed, an electronic version has been created and verified accuracy ; Electronic: prior and current fiscal year or superseded, all discrepancies are resolved and audited
